title: Gooey Seitan Muffin Bake
description: A savory and gooey seitan bake served with a side of toasted muffins. This dish is perfect for a meatless dinner or a comforting snack.
instructions: Cut the seitan into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
Toast the muffins in a toaster or under the broiler until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, whisk together sour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the seitan to the bowl and toss until coated with the sour mixture.
Transfer the seitan to a baking dish and drizzle with olive oil.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the seitan is golden brown.
To serve, place a toasted muffin on each plate and top with the seitan bake.
